lemmas.body: List.drop 0 (List.map f (x :: xs)) = List.map f (List.drop 0 (x :: xs))
lemmas.conclusion: List.drop n (List.map f (x :: xs)) = List.map f (List.drop n (x :: xs))
lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (h1 : List.drop 0 (List.map f (x :: xs)) = List.map f (List.drop 0 (x :: xs))) : List.drop n (List.map f (x :: xs)) = List.map f (List.drop n (x :: xs))

lemmas.body: List.drop n (List.map f []) = List.map f (List.drop n []) ∧ ((x : α) → (ih : ∀ (n : ℕ), List.drop n (List.map f xs) = List.map f (List.drop n xs)) → (a✝ : List.drop n (List.map f (x :: xs)) = List.map f (List.drop n (x :: xs))) → List.drop (n + 1) (List.map f (x :: xs)) = List.map f (List.drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)))
lemmas.conclusion: List.drop n (List.map f xs) = List.map f (List.drop n xs)
lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (xs : List α) (h1 : List.drop n (List.map f []) = List.map f (List.drop n []) ∧ ((x : α) → (ih : ∀ (n : ℕ), List.drop n (List.map f xs) = List.map f (List.drop n xs)) → (a✝ : List.drop n (List.map f (x :: xs)) = List.map f (List.drop n (x :: xs))) → List.drop (n + 1) (List.map f (x :: xs)) = List.map f (List.drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)))) : List.drop n (List.map f xs) = List.map f (List.drop n xs)

lemmas.conclusion: List.drop n (List.map f []) = List.map f (List.drop n [])
lemmas.statement: List.drop n (List.map f []) = List.map f (List.drop n [])

lemmas.body: List.drop n [] = ∧ ((x : α) → (ih : ∀ (n : ℕ), List.drop n (List.map f xs) = List.map f (List.drop n xs)) → List.drop n (List.map f (x :: xs)) = List.map f (List.drop n (x :: xs)))

lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (xs : List α) (h1 : List.drop n [] = ∧ ((x : α) → (ih : ∀ (n : ℕ), List.drop n (List.map f xs) = List.map f (List.drop n xs)) → List.drop n (List.map f (x :: xs)) = List.map f (List.drop n (x :: xs)))) : List.drop n (List.map f xs) = List.map f (List.drop n xs)
